title: 中国正在应对其自身的“男性圈”
content:
China is facing challenges related to its own version of the manosphere, an online subculture focused on men's interests and grievances. The phenomenon mirrors similar movements in Western countries. (8 words)

Wait, let me recount: actually 24 words. Let me revise:

China faces challenges from its own manosphere, an online male subculture echoing Western counterparts. (14 words)

title: 国家公园一片混乱。特朗普正使情况雪上加霜
content: With its ancient sequoias, towering waterfalls and glacier-carved granite cliffs, California’s Yosemite National Park has long been one of the most visited destinations in the national park system, helping to inspire its very creation. The vistas, which span more than 1,100 square miles along the Sierra Nevada mountain range, are inspiring to say the least.
